")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "curl.exe -s http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/program/4/schedule" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
# Get first few weeks of exercises with their IDs
for week in d.get\('weeks', []\)[:2]:
    print\(f'=== Week {week[\\"week_number\\"]} ==='\)
    for sess in week.get\('sessions', []\):
        print\(f'  Session: {sess[\\"session_name\\"]}'\)
        for ex in sess.get\('exercises', []\)[:4]:
            print\(f'    ID={ex[\\"id\\"]} {ex[\\"exercise_name\\"]} {ex[\\"sets\\"]}x{ex[\\"reps\\"]}'\)
        print\(f'    ... \({len\(sess[\\"exercises\\"]\)} exercises total\)'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "curl.exe -s http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/program/4/schedule" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\)
schedule = d['schedule']
# Print all exercises for weeks 1-3 with IDs
for week in ['1','2','3']:
    if week in schedule:
        print\(f'Week {week}:'\)
        for sess_name, exercises in schedule[week].items\(\):
            print\(f'  {sess_name}: IDs {[e[\\"id\\"] for e in exercises]}'\)
" 2>&1)
